queries.question: List EILName, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where EILName contains 'middle'.
queries.sql: SELECT eil_name, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE eil_name LIKE '%middle%';

queries.question: List EILName, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where EILName contains 'intermediate'.
queries.sql: SELECT eil_name, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE eil_name LIKE '%intermediate%';

queries.question: List EILName, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where EILName equals 'Intermediate/Middle/Junior High'.
queries.sql: SELECT eil_name, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE eil_name = 'Intermediate/Middle/Junior High';

queries.question: List EILCode, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where EILCode equals 'INTMIDJR'.
queries.sql: SELECT eil_code, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE eil_code = 'INTMIDJR';

queries.question: List GSserved, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where GSserved equals '9-12'.
queries.sql: SELECT g_sserved, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE g_sserved = '9-12';

queries.question: List EILCode, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where EILCode contains 'intmidjr'.
queries.sql: SELECT eil_code, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE eil_code LIKE '%intmidjr%';

queries.question: List AvgScrWrite, row_id, AvgScrMath from satscores where AvgScrWrite >= 514.
queries.sql: SELECT avg_scr_write, row_id, avg_scr_math FROM satscores WHERE avg_scr_write >= 514;

queries.question: List cname, row_id, AvgScrMath from satscores where cname equals 'Fresno'.
queries.sql: SELECT cname, row_id, avg_scr_math FROM satscores WHERE cname = 'Fresno';

queries.question: Find NumTstTakr, AvgScrMath, row_id from satscores where NumTstTakr >= 36 and AvgScrMath >= 473.
queries.sql: SELECT num_tst_takr, avg_scr_math, row_id FROM satscores WHERE num_tst_takr >= 36 AND avg_scr_math >= 473;

queries.question: Find GSserved, EILCode, row_id from schools where GSserved equals '9-12' and EILCode equals 'HS'.
queries.sql: SELECT g_sserved, eil_code, row_id FROM schools WHERE g_sserved = '9-12' AND eil_code = 'HS';

queries.question: Find EILName, row_id, AdmEmail1 from schools where EILName equals 'Intermediate/Middle/Junior High' and EILName contains 'intermediate'.
queries.sql: SELECT eil_name, row_id, adm_email1 FROM schools WHERE eil_name = 'Intermediate/Middle/Junior High' AND eil_name LIKE '%intermediate%';

queries.question: Find NumGE1500, AvgScrRead, row_id from satscores where NumGE1500 <= 24 and AvgScrRead >= 473.
queries.sql: SELECT num_ge1500, avg_scr_read, row_id FROM satscores WHERE num_ge1500 <= 24 AND avg_scr_read >= 473;

queries.question: Find NumGE1500, AvgScrRead, row_id from satscores where NumGE1500 >= 33 and AvgScrRead >= 473.
queries.sql: SELECT num_ge1500, avg_scr_read, row_id FROM satscores WHERE num_ge1500 >= 33 AND avg_scr_read >= 473;

queries.question: Find GSserved, EILName, row_id from schools where GSserved equals '9-12' and EILName equals 'High School'.
queries.sql: SELECT g_sserved, eil_name, row_id FROM schools WHERE g_sserved = '9-12' AND eil_name = 'High School';

queries.question: Find AvgScrRead, NumGE1500, row_id from satscores where AvgScrRead <= 460 and NumGE1500 <= 33.
queries.sql: SELECT avg_scr_read, num_ge1500, row_id FROM satscores WHERE avg_scr_read <= 460 AND num_ge1500 <= 33;

queries.question: Find AvgScrWrite, AvgScrRead, row_id from satscores where AvgScrWrite >= 514 and AvgScrRead >= 473.
queries.sql: SELECT avg_scr_write, avg_scr_read, row_id FROM satscores WHERE avg_scr_write >= 514 AND avg_scr_read >= 473;

queries.question: Find GSserved, EILName, row_id from schools where GSserved equals '9-12', EILName equals 'High School', and EILName contains 'school'.
queries.sql: SELECT g_sserved, eil_name, row_id FROM schools WHERE g_sserved = '9-12' AND eil_name = 'High School' AND eil_name LIKE '%school%';

queries.question: Find AvgScrRead, AvgScrMath, NumGE1500 from satscores where AvgScrRead >= 491, AvgScrMath >= 473, and NumGE1500 <= 33.
queries.sql: SELECT avg_scr_read, avg_scr_math, num_ge1500 FROM satscores WHERE avg_scr_read >= 491 AND avg_scr_math >= 473 AND num_ge1500 <= 33;
